steps.name: source-collector-and-ranking
steps.summary: Added the pure topic source collector/ranking contract with source type roles, duplicate URL suppression, cache TTL, daily collection limit, scoring signals, and source_fetch usage event recording. Discovery/reaction sources remain excluded from claim support.

steps.name: research-pack-boundary
steps.summary: Added the pure research pack boundary with non-public pack records, post source records, source snapshots that reject full raw text, official/original claim support separation, and discovery-only strong-claim blocking.
